subject: ownership_control_verification

verification_methods.description: Publish a DNS TXT record proving domain control.
Each claimed wallet must sign a dated message referencing this well-known file.
EVM contracts should be verified through Etherscan or compatible explorers.
Contract owner, admin, proxy admin, timelock, or multisig control must be independently checked.
AWS control must be supported by IAM, CloudTrail, Route 53, S3, CloudFront, or billing/admin evidence.
Repository commits should be signed with verified SSH, GPG, or Sigstore identity.

ownership_limitations: This file does not independently prove legal title.
This file does not independently prove beneficial ownership of cryptocurrency.
This file does not independently prove AWS account control.
This file does not independently prove wallet control.
Wallet ownership requires valid cryptographic signatures.
Contract ownership or admin rights require on-chain role verification.
AWS account references require provider-level administrative proof.
